description: SQL Check definitions for EOS.Horizon support tooling. This file defines the contract between the UI and the API. In production, check definitions are stored in database tables and served via GET /api/support/sql-checks. This JSON represents the shape of that API response.

globalParameters.label: COB Date
globalParameters.description: Close of business date. All checks run against this date's data snapshot.

globalParameters.label: Environment
globalParameters.description: Target database environment for query execution.

globalParameters.label: Book
globalParameters.description: Trading book filter. ALL runs across all books.

globalParameters.label: Benchmark
globalParameters.description: Benchmark/index filter. ALL runs across all benchmarks.

presets.label: EOD PROD
presets.description: End-of-day production run with all books and benchmarks

checks.name: Bootstrap Curve Validation
checks.description: Checks forward curves for smoothness and arbitrage-free pricing. Compares adjacent tenor prices and flags any delta exceeding the configured threshold.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Bootstrap Curve Validation
-- Checks forward curves for smoothness and arbitrage-free pricing
SELECT
    c.benchmark, c.tenor, c.settle_date,
    c.price AS current_price,
    LAG(c.price) OVER (PARTITION BY c.benchmark ORDER BY c.tenor) AS prev_price,
    ABS(c.price - LAG(c.price) OVER (PARTITION BY c.benchmark ORDER BY c.tenor)) AS delta,
    CASE WHEN ABS(c.price - LAG(c.price) OVER (PARTITION BY c.benchmark ORDER BY c.tenor)) > c.price * (@max_delta_pct / 100.0)
         THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END AS check_result
FROM curve_data c
WHERE c.curve_date = @cob
  AND (@benchmark = 'ALL' OR c.benchmark = @benchmark)
ORDER BY c.benchmark, c.tenor;

parameters.label: Max Delta %
parameters.description: Maximum allowed price change between adjacent tenors as a percentage

schedule.description: Weekdays at 17:00 after EOD curve snapshot

checks.name: Forward Curve Monotonicity
checks.description: Detects backward inversions in the forward curve where a later tenor has a lower price than the preceding tenor, indicating potential data or model issues.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Forward Curve Monotonicity
-- Detects backward inversions in the forward curve
SELECT benchmark, tenor, price,
    LAG(price) OVER (PARTITION BY benchmark ORDER BY tenor) AS prev,
    CASE WHEN price < LAG(price) OVER (PARTITION BY benchmark ORDER BY tenor) THEN 'INVERSION'
         ELSE 'OK' END AS status
FROM curve_data
WHERE curve_date = @cob
  AND (@benchmark = 'ALL' OR benchmark = @benchmark)
  AND tenor_months BETWEEN @tenor_start AND @tenor_end
ORDER BY benchmark, tenor;

parameters.label: Tenor Start (months)
parameters.description: Start of tenor range to check (months from spot)

parameters.label: Tenor End (months)
parameters.description: End of tenor range to check (months from spot)

schedule.description: Weekdays at 17:00 after EOD curve snapshot

checks.name: Stale Price Detection
checks.description: Flags prices that have not been updated within a configurable staleness threshold from the COB timestamp. Stale prices may indicate feed failures or missing market data.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Stale Price Detection
-- Flags prices not updated within staleness threshold
SELECT benchmark, tenor, price, last_updated,
    DATEDIFF(hour, last_updated, @cob + ' 17:00') AS hours_stale
FROM curve_data
WHERE curve_date = @cob
  AND DATEDIFF(hour, last_updated, @cob + ' 17:00') > @staleness_threshold_hours
  AND (@benchmark = 'ALL' OR benchmark = @benchmark)
ORDER BY hours_stale DESC;

parameters.label: Staleness Threshold (hours)
parameters.description: Number of hours after which a price is considered stale

schedule.description: Weekdays at 17:30, after curve snapshot completes

checks.name: Trade Duplicate Check
checks.description: Identifies trades with identical key fields (counterparty, direction, volume, price, trade date) within a configurable lookback window. Potential duplicates from double-entry or feed replay.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Trade Duplicate Check
-- Identifies trades with identical key fields
SELECT t1.trade_id, t1.counterparty, t1.direction,
    t1.volume, t1.price, t1.trade_date,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.counterparty, t1.direction,
        t1.volume, t1.price, t1.trade_date) AS dup_count
FROM trades t1
WHERE t1.trade_date BETWEEN DATEADD(day, -@lookback_days, @cob) AND @cob
  AND (@book = 'ALL' OR t1.book = @book)
HAVING dup_count > 1
ORDER BY t1.trade_date DESC;

parameters.label: Lookback Days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back from COB date for duplicate detection

checks.name: Missing Settlement Prices
checks.description: Checks for settlement periods where the expected price publication date has passed but no price record exists. Configurable lookahead window to catch upcoming gaps.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Missing Settlement Prices
-- Checks for settlement periods without published prices
SELECT s.benchmark, s.delivery_month, s.settlement_type,
    s.expected_date, s.status
FROM settlement_schedule s
LEFT JOIN settlement_prices sp
    ON s.benchmark = sp.benchmark
    AND s.delivery_month = sp.delivery_month
WHERE sp.price IS NULL
  AND s.expected_date BETWEEN DATEADD(day, -@lookback_days, @cob) AND DATEADD(day, @lookahead_days, @cob)
  AND (@benchmark = 'ALL' OR s.benchmark = @benchmark)
ORDER BY s.expected_date;

parameters.label: Lookback Days
parameters.description: Number of past days to check for missing settlements

parameters.label: Lookahead Days
parameters.description: Number of future days to check for upcoming settlement gaps

schedule.description: Weekdays at 09:00 to catch overnight settlement gaps

checks.name: Position-Trade Reconciliation
checks.description: Verifies that aggregated position volumes match the sum of underlying trade volumes. Flags any variance exceeding the configured tolerance threshold.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Position-Trade Reconciliation
-- Verifies aggregated positions match underlying trades
SELECT p.benchmark, p.delivery_month,
    p.net_position AS pos_volume,
    SUM(CASE t.direction WHEN 'BUY' THEN t.volume
         ELSE -t.volume END) AS trade_volume,
    p.net_position - SUM(CASE t.direction WHEN 'BUY' THEN t.volume ELSE -t.volume END) AS variance
FROM positions p
JOIN trades t ON p.benchmark = t.benchmark
    AND p.delivery_month = t.delivery_month
WHERE p.as_of_date = @cob
  AND (@book = 'ALL' OR p.book = @book)
GROUP BY p.benchmark, p.delivery_month, p.net_position
HAVING ABS(p.net_position - SUM(CASE t.direction WHEN 'BUY' THEN t.volume ELSE -t.volume END)) > @variance_threshold
ORDER BY ABS(variance) DESC;

parameters.label: Variance Threshold
parameters.description: Minimum absolute variance to flag (in volume units, e.g. MMBtu)

schedule.description: Weekdays at 17:15 after position calc completes

checks.name: Credit Limit Validation
checks.description: Checks counterparty credit exposure against approved limits. Flags any counterparty whose utilisation percentage exceeds the configured warning threshold.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Credit Limit Validation
-- Checks counterparty exposure against credit limits
SELECT cp.name, cp.credit_limit,
    SUM(t.mtm_value) AS exposure,
    cp.credit_limit - SUM(t.mtm_value) AS headroom,
    ROUND(SUM(t.mtm_value) / cp.credit_limit * 100, 1) AS utilisation_pct
FROM counterparties cp
JOIN trades t ON cp.id = t.counterparty_id
WHERE t.status IN ('FO-Validated', 'Trade Checked')
  AND t.value_date >= @cob
  AND (@book = 'ALL' OR t.book = @book)
GROUP BY cp.name, cp.credit_limit
HAVING ROUND(SUM(t.mtm_value) / cp.credit_limit * 100, 1) >= @utilisation_warning_pct
ORDER BY utilisation_pct DESC;

parameters.label: Warning Threshold %
parameters.description: Utilisation percentage above which a counterparty is flagged

schedule.description: Weekdays at 18:00 after all EOD processing

checks.name: Counterparty Master Check
checks.description: Validates active counterparty records for completeness: LEI codes, credit limits, and KYC expiry. Configurable KYC warning window to catch upcoming expirations.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Counterparty Master Check
-- Validates counterparty records for completeness
SELECT cp.id, cp.name, cp.lei, cp.status,
    cp.kyc_expiry,
    CASE WHEN cp.lei IS NULL THEN 'Missing LEI'
         WHEN cp.credit_limit IS NULL THEN 'No credit limit'
         WHEN cp.kyc_expiry < @cob THEN 'KYC expired'
         WHEN DATEDIFF(day, @cob, cp.kyc_expiry) <= @kyc_warning_days THEN 'KYC expiring soon'
         ELSE 'Valid' END AS validation
FROM counterparties cp
WHERE cp.status = 'Active'
  AND (cp.lei IS NULL OR cp.credit_limit IS NULL OR cp.kyc_expiry < DATEADD(day, @kyc_warning_days, @cob))
ORDER BY cp.name;

parameters.label: KYC Warning Days
parameters.description: Number of days before KYC expiry to raise a warning

checks.name: Unmatched Nominations
checks.description: Finds nominations that have no matching trade or cargo record. Configurable forward window controls how far ahead to look for unmatched flow dates.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Unmatched Nominations
-- Finds nominations without a matching trade or cargo
SELECT n.nom_id, n.facility, n.direction,
    n.volume_mmbtu, n.flow_date, n.status,
    n.counterparty
FROM nominations n
LEFT JOIN trades t ON n.trade_id = t.trade_id
WHERE t.trade_id IS NULL
  AND n.flow_date BETWEEN @cob AND DATEADD(day, @forward_days, @cob)
  AND n.status != 'Cancelled'
ORDER BY n.flow_date;

parameters.label: Forward Window (days)
parameters.description: Number of days forward from COB to check for unmatched nominations

checks.name: Invoice Amount Validation
checks.description: Checks invoiced amounts against system-calculated amounts. Flags any variance exceeding the configured tolerance percentage of the invoice amount.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Invoice Amount Validation
-- Checks invoiced amounts against calculated amounts
SELECT i.invoice_id, i.counterparty, i.invoice_amount,
    c.calculated_amount,
    ABS(i.invoice_amount - c.calculated_amount) AS variance,
    CASE WHEN ABS(i.invoice_amount - c.calculated_amount) > i.invoice_amount * (@tolerance_pct / 100.0)
         THEN 'OUT OF TOLERANCE' ELSE 'OK' END AS status
FROM invoices i
JOIN calculated_settlements c
    ON i.trade_id = c.trade_id AND i.period = c.period
WHERE i.invoice_date <= @cob
  AND i.status IN ('Pending', 'Approved')
  AND (@book = 'ALL' OR i.book = @book)
ORDER BY variance DESC;

parameters.label: Tolerance %
parameters.description: Maximum allowed variance as percentage of invoice amount

checks.name: Orphaned Cargo Check
checks.description: Finds physical cargoes that lack both a buy and sell trade linkage. Configurable forward window controls how far ahead to look for orphaned cargoes.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- Orphaned Cargo Check
-- Finds cargoes without both a buy and sell trade
SELECT c.cargo_id, c.vessel, c.load_port, c.discharge_port,
    c.load_date, c.volume_mmbtu,
    CASE WHEN tb.trade_id IS NULL THEN 'No buy trade'
         WHEN ts.trade_id IS NULL THEN 'No sell trade'
         END AS issue
FROM cargoes c
LEFT JOIN trades tb ON c.buy_trade_id = tb.trade_id
LEFT JOIN trades ts ON c.sell_trade_id = ts.trade_id
WHERE (tb.trade_id IS NULL OR ts.trade_id IS NULL)
  AND c.load_date BETWEEN @cob AND DATEADD(day, @forward_days, @cob)
ORDER BY c.load_date;

parameters.label: Forward Window (days)
parameters.description: Number of days forward from COB to check for orphaned cargoes

checks.name: EOD Completeness
checks.description: Validates that all end-of-day batch steps completed successfully. Configurable maximum allowed duration per step to catch hung processes.
checks.sqlTemplate:
-- EOD Completeness
-- Validates all end-of-day batch steps completed
SELECT step_name, step_order, status,
    started_at, completed_at,
    DATEDIFF(second, started_at, completed_at) AS duration_sec
FROM eod_batch_log
WHERE batch_date = @cob
  AND (status != 'COMPLETE' OR DATEDIFF(second, started_at, completed_at) > @max_step_duration_sec)
ORDER BY step_order;

parameters.label: Max Step Duration (sec)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed duration for any single EOD step in seconds before flagging

schedule.description: Weekdays at 17:30 after EOD batch window
